title: Tell Me Tonight
writer: Henri-Georges Clouzot, Albrecht Joseph, Irma von Cube
actors: Jan Kiepura, Pierre Brasseur, Charlotte Lysès
plot: Opera singer Enrico Ferraro escapes from his manager and too many engagements changing trains for the Riviera. He makes a friend and stops at a village for some well deserved holidays, where he meets a beautiful girl.
